creator: raimeetravel
caption:
A reminder to use your free will no matter what!!! Craziest secret trip I’ve taken 😅 Sometimes you just have to book the ticket and take the ride 🤷‍♀️ Trips like this remind me that we really only have one life to live, and asking for permission won’t get you many places! 

#japan #daytrip #traveltips #playinghooky

transcription.text: It's currently 8 37 a.m. On a Wednesday and my job does not know that I'm about to fly to Japan for the week I can't believe I'm doing this I convinced myself this was a good idea for a few reasons one being I didn't have any meetings this day and Japan is 17 Hours ahead so when I got there I could have full days of exploring in the future while my team was asleep in the past My plan was then to wake up at 2 or 3 in the morning when I did have to take calls and it was rough It's 8 30 in the morning here and I just did four calls and now I'm going back to bed My thing is if the work gets done Why does it matter when or where I'm getting it done from like I didn't get a lot of sleep But I got to explore Japan and 10 vacation days is just not enough So sometimes I have to do crazy things like this and I'll tell you this is my motto ask for forgiveness and not permission Because you know what I did get all of my work done and this is what life is all about to me I had the most amazing time all over Japan. I went to some lesser-known prefectures and I met the best people so the lack of sleep was worth it I was only there for five days and nobody found out until now I got and yes You're allowed to take work calls as a tourist on vacation and work if you're seeing this, sorry This was a few months ago
